input_claim_or_question: Does deep learning improve MRI segmentation robustness across scanners?

document_a.title: Single-Site Deep Learning for MRI Segmentation
sentences: Our model achieved 0.91 Dice score on the training site scanner.

document_b.title: Multi-Site Evaluation of Segmentation Generalization
sentences: The same model dropped to 0.63 Dice when tested on scanners from different sites.

gold_evidence: Document A supports but Document B limits or contradicts.

document_a.title: Metformin and Longevity in Mouse Models
sentences: Metformin administration extended median lifespan by 5.83% in mice initiated at 9 months.

document_b.title: Metformin and All-Cause Mortality in Diabetic Patients
sentences: No statistically significant difference in all-cause mortality was observed between metformin and other antidiabetic agents after covariate adjustment.

gold_evidence: Document A supports but Document B limits or contradicts.

input_claim_or_question: Does gut microbiome dysbiosis cause depression?

document_a.title: Microbiome Composition and Depression Scores
sentences: Individuals with major depressive disorder showed significantly lower Lactobacillus counts compared to healthy controls.

document_b.title: Probiotic Supplementation RCT for Depression
sentences: A randomized controlled trial found no significant improvement in depression scores after 12 weeks of probiotic supplementation.

gold_evidence: Document A supports but Document B limits or contradicts.

input_claim_or_question: Is CRISPR-Cas9 off-target editing rate acceptably low for therapeutic use?

document_a.title: CRISPR Off-Target Assessment via Standard Sequencing
sentences: Standard whole-genome sequencing detected off-target mutations at a rate below 0.1%.

document_b.title: High-Sensitivity Off-Target Detection with Orthogonal Methods
sentences: Orthogonal detection methods identified 47 previously undetected off-target editing sites in the same cell line.

gold_evidence: Document A supports but Document B limits or contradicts.

input_claim_or_question: Does sleep restriction impair cognition universally across age groups?

document_a.title: Sleep Restriction and Cognitive Performance in Young Adults
sentences: Restricting sleep to 6 hours for two weeks produced cognitive impairments equivalent to 48 hours of total deprivation in adults aged 21-38.

document_b.title: Age-Related Differences in Sleep Restriction Tolerance
sentences: Older adults demonstrated different compensatory neural patterns and showed less performance degradation under identical sleep restriction protocols.

gold_evidence: Document A supports but Document B limits or contradicts.
